expo.name: Temple TV
expo.description: Stream live worship, sermons, and teachings from Temple TV JCTM Broadcasting — Jesus Christ Temple Ministry.

infoPlist.NSUserNotificationsUsageDescription: Temple TV uses notifications to alert you when a live broadcast or new sermon is available.
infoPlist.NSPhotoLibraryUsageDescription: Temple TV needs access to your photo library so you can choose a profile picture.
infoPlist.NSPhotoLibraryAddUsageDescription: Temple TV can save shared content to your photo library.

plugins.photosPermission: Temple TV needs access to your photo library so you can choose a profile picture.

plugins.faceIDPermission: Allow Temple TV to use Face ID to keep your account signed in securely.
